headline: Payment sovereignty and the relationship with cash

headline: Mastercard (MA) flashes major signal on New York BitLicense
summary: Most traditional finance companies treat crypto as a side project. They run a pilot, publish a press release, and move on. Mastercard (MA) has spent the past two months doing something harder. First, it spent up to $1.8 billion to buy a stablecoin firm. Then it got licensed to handle digital assets ...

headline: WORLDLINE : Worldline and ING complete a live end-to-end European agentic payment in production - Press release
summary: Worldline and ING complete a live end-to-end European agentic payment in production Demonstrating with Mastercard that secure and compliant agentic payment is a deployable reality today Paris-La Défense & Amsterdam - 2 June 2026 – At Money 20/20, Worldline [Euronext: WLN], a European leader in payment services, and ING, a global financial institution with a strong European base, announce the successful execution of Europe's first end-to-end agentic payment transaction in production with Masterca

headline: Plot Raises $10M to Scale Social Video Intelligence for Marketing Teams at Fortune 500 Brands
summary: Plot, the social video intelligence platform trusted by Visa, Mastercard, PepsiCo, Fenty Beauty, Benefit Cosmetics, and CAVA, today announced $10M in new funding to meet enterprise demand for its expanding platform. The seed round brings Plot's total raised to $14M and was co-led by XYZ Venture Capital and Mischief Ventures, with participation from Seven Seven Six and Acme Capital.

headline: What Mastercard (MA)'s Pivot Toward Crypto and Real‑Time Payments Means For Shareholders
summary: In recent months, Mastercard has reported double‑digit revenue and transaction growth, expanded deeper into digital and crypto payments, and joined a Eurosystem pilot for instant cross‑currency settlements while Berkshire Hathaway exited its long‑held position in the stock. Together, these developments highlight Mastercard’s shift from a card-centric business to a broader payments infrastructure provider spanning stablecoins, real‑time rails, and value‑added services. Next, we’ll examine how...
